search_parameters.q: how to remove red wine stain from carpet

search_information.query_displayed: how to remove red wine stain from carpet

text_blocks.answer: Blot—never rub—the spill with a clean, dry towel to absorb excess liquid. Flush the stain with cold water or club soda, then apply a mixture of 1 tbsp liquid dish soap and 1 tbsp white vinegar in 2 cups of warm water. Blot again until the color transfers.
Detailed Treatment Steps
Acting quickly is the key to preventing red wine from permanently bonding to carpet fibers. Follow these steps to lift the stain:
Blot Immediately: Use a clean paper towel or absorbent cloth to press down on the stain. Never rub or scrub, as this pushes the pigment deeper into the backing of the carpet.

organic_results.title: Help! Spilled red wine on rug! : r/CleaningTips
organic_results.snippet: I blotted the stain, then used a solution of 2 parts peroxide to 1 part dish soap and scrubbed it. I sprinkled a generous amount of baking soda ...
snippet_highlighted_words: used a solution of 2 parts peroxide to 1 part dish soap and scrubbed it

organic_results.title: How to Get Red Wine Out of Carpet
organic_results.snippet: Mix two parts hydrogen peroxide and one part dishwashing soap. Apply the solution to your carpet stain. Blot and repeat until the stain is gone.
snippet_highlighted_words: Mix two parts hydrogen peroxide and one part dishwashing soap

organic_results.title: Red Wine on Carpet: Stain Removal Guide - NCCA
organic_results.snippet: With one part dish soap and three parts hydrogen peroxide, use a cloth to apply to the stain and leave it for around 30 minutes. Blot the stain ...
snippet_highlighted_words: With one part dish soap and three parts hydrogen peroxide

organic_results.title: How To Get Red Wine Out Of Your Carpet
organic_results.snippet: Step 1: Blot, don't rub. pour a small amount of cool water onto the stain, and blot it again with a white cloth or paper towel. mix two cups of warm (not hot) ...

organic_results.title: [LPT Request] How to get set red wine stains out of carpet?
organic_results.snippet: The best I've found is to make a mixture of hydrogen peroxide (get it at the drug store in the antiseptic section) and Dawn (or other dish soap).
snippet_highlighted_words: make a mixture of hydrogen per
